The year’s meteor season begins with the Lyrid shower, seen from April 16 to 25. The peak night to watch is Wednesday, April 22, beginning at around 10 p.m. Look to the east for an average of 20 meteors whose long, bright tails will streak across a dark sky.  All the signs of spring are […]
